author: Mentat Team
description: Your local agentic cognitive partner for Obsidian, managing structured knowledge, local command operations, and deep mathematical reasoning. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Secbone
manifest.description: Your local agentic cognitive partner, managing structured knowledge, local command operations, and deep mathematical reasoning.
manifest.name: Mentat

name: Mentat

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🧠 Mentat v0.3.9 Release

This is an automated release for Mentat—your local agentic cognitive partner for Obsidian.

### 📦 Files included:
* `main.js`: Compiled production bundle.
* `manifest.json`: Plugin description and metadata.
* `styles.css`: Custom UI styles and themes.

To install:
1. Download the assets.
2. Copy them into your vault's plugin directory: `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/mentat/`.
3. Enable Mentat in Obsidian's Community Plugins settings.
